name: CHAMPIONS ONCOLOGY, INC.
summary: PART I Overview We are a technology-enabled research organization engaged in creating technology solutions to be utilized in drug discovery and development. Our research center operates in both regulatory and non-regulatory environments and consists of a comprehensive set of computational and experimental research platforms.
